name: Armada Hoffler Properties Inc. 6.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Armada Hoffler Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that primarily invests in office, retail, and multi-family properties in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeastern United States. The company's business model focuses on developing, owning, and managing high-quality properties to generate income and long-term capital appreciation. Armada Hoffler Properties is headquartered in Virginia Beach, Virginia.
